nasb.text: David sent the people out, one third under the command of Joab, one third under the command of Abishai the son of Zeruiah, Joab’s brother, and one third under the command of Ittai the Gittite. And the king said to the people, “I myself will surely go out with you also.”

esv.text: And David sent out the army, one third under the command of Joab, one third under the command of Abishai the son of Zeruiah, Joab’s brother, and one third under the command of Ittai the Gittite. And the king said to the men, “I myself will also go out with you.”

cnv.text: 大衛派遣眾人出戰：三分之一在約押手下，三分之一在約押的兄弟、洗魯雅的兒子亞比篩手下，三分之一在迦特人以太手下。大衛對眾人說：“我也必與你們一同出戰。”

ccb.text: 他兵分三队，一队由约押率领，一队由洗鲁雅的儿子、约押的兄弟亚比筛率领，一队由迦特人以太率领。大卫对部下说：“我必与你们一同出战”。
